Title: let's build a simple gui dashboard with a gpu monitor window

Anchor: scratch
Interpretation: let's build a simple gui dashboard with a gpu monitor window

- [ ] Prepare project root | ensure_dir . | verify: dir_exists .
- [ ] Implement static web app | write_file index.html | contents_b64:  | verify: contains index.html </html>
- [ ] Write smoke checker | write_file smoke_check.py | contents_b64:  | verify: contains smoke_check.py CF_OK
- [ ] Write project contract | write_file ProjectSpec.json | contents_b64:  | verify: contains ProjectSpec.json html
- [ ] Run static web smoke check | run py -3 smoke_check.py | verify: stdout_contains CF_OK
